headline: Sentiment down 57% this week, fears declining
key_insights: Frustrations trending down 2% over 7 days (weak momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 144 quotes and an overwhelming 116 at strong intensity - people are extremely agitated today.

• At 84.3, frustration levels remain near the upper end of the typical range, though slightly down from yesterday's 82.1.

• Both fears and optimism stay deeply suppressed, with optimism particularly weak at -40.2 despite having some strong-intensity quotes.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
